title: Asia markets mostly end lower as U.S. reportedly intercepts Iranian oil tankers, rattling fragile ceasefire optimism
summary_full: Asian equities retreated after reports of U.S. tanker interceptions raised doubts over the durability of an Iran ceasefire.
summary_public: Asian equities retreated after reports of U.S. tanker interceptions raised doubts over the durability of an Iran ceasefire.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. reportedly intercepts Iranian oil tankers
